{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032411443753512BE5BDA721E8EE13"}"},"total":1302},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597617896210907929","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"强烈推荐，在我看来没啥毒点，除了第一个世界有的地方写的磨叽。
也没有强压主角等级，每次模拟主角也能通过在成长期刷属性来突破上限不断变强。即使主角没什么高级天赋，模拟的成长也能让主角的天赋更加强大。比隔壁模拟的灵根不行突破要更多资源的设定看着更舒服。
每天更新的量也大，追读体验也不错。
不过现实世界写的偏少，希望后面比例能到1：1"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768962615,"group_id":"7585823496681294910","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz11x0fp83XyKwnXC3T+wjSG6G0sE+3Yupjlre9UXDwH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/778ac9b045234fbab26352d12d456170~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874308&x-signature=%2FZHh8LnAvDnjBLixtXnoMfbbssc%3D","user_id":"4226988886471044","user_name":"打大鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4226988886471044","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7585823496681294910","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟器】+【抽象】+【另开世界模拟】+【现实横扫】+【有一定的脑子】
　　穿越到高武世界，武者们劈山碎月，天门外，万族争锋，天才一出生就自带天赋神通，横扫同级……
　　许飞虽然武道资质不算优秀，但是他有挂啊！
　　一个一个时代的模拟，飞升更高能的未来！
　　史前时代，打爆从远古遗活的莽荒巨鳄！
　　部落时代，巫师召唤雷霆，斩岩断流！
　　战国时代，众武将借群星之力，移山倒海！
　　蒸汽时代，红月翻身，猩异之目俯瞰大地！
　　赛博时代，磁爆力场扭转天之铁穹！
　　星空时代，人族大帝托举银川，横扫星空长廊！
　　回归高武世界，他脚踏诸天，捉拿万界之心。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/91674fec0a422270c5ad97f1829c67c4","author":"金涛骇浪三号机","author_id":"","book_id":"7585823496681294910","book_name":"苦在模拟中吃过了现在该享大福了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585823523411608126","read_count":"81175","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"804803"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"376","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/985454c89b80458a30935f22c36024fb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507877&x-signature=vowWdWml6%2Bxg0WA8GDqvVGMGtR4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2440543026807923","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"116"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032411443753512BE5BDA721E8EE13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_coun
